creator: karsten@photor.de
text:
--->  Installing 'WildMagic-4.p5' from a port (graphics/wildmagic)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/graphics/wildmagic'
===>  Cleaning for WildMagic-4.p5
=> WildMagic4p5.zip doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.geometrictools.com/Downloads/.
--2008-07-22 10:39:28--  http://www.geometrictools.com/Downloads/WildMagic4p5.zip
Resolving www.geometrictools.com... 207.217.125.50
Connecting to www.geometrictools.com|207.217.125.50|:80... connected.
HTTP request sent, awaiting response... 302 Found
Location: http://www.geometrictools.com/Downloads/Downloads.html [following]
--2008-07-22 10:39:34--  http://www.geometrictools.com/Downloads/Downloads.html
Connecting to www.geometrictools.com|207.217.125.50|:80... connected.
HTTP request sent, awaiting response... 416 Requested Range Not Satisfiable

    The file is already fully retrieved; nothing to do.
===>  Extracting for WildMagic-4.p5
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portinstall.11480.0 env make
** Fix the problem and try again.
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
	! graphics/wildmagic	(unknown build error)

Fix: 

I think, only the version of wildmagic needs to be changed to 4.7. This is the Version found on www.geometrictools.com/Downloads/. Version 4.5 could not be found.

(I do not know at the moment, if version 4.7 installs correct and if changes have to be applied; will test it soon)
How-To-Repeat: portinstall graphics/wildmagic
